temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_Current: The biome has remained static. No growth, no decay (as the specimens were already absent/lost at the start of the sequence). The single sprout has remained unchanged in position and size.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The registry indicates a collection of four distinct plants, yet the visual evidence confirms only a single, unidentified sprout. The lack of foliage, stems, or root structures for the registered species indicates a total loss of the intended botanical inventory.

anomalies: Presence of white debris (possible eggshells or mineral deposits) in the black pot.
Unidentified single sprout in the black pot.
Total absence of registered P1, P2, P3, and P4 specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete failure of the botanical registry. The pots are essentially devoid of the expected flora. The only biological presence is a single, unidentified sprout in the black pot cluster. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed propagation setup, with no signs of active growth or maintenance of the original species.
